caption: A person's hands are seen manipulating a clear plastic package of metal cutting dies against a light-colored surface featuring crafting samples. The package is labeled "FROSTED FRAMES 5 DIES" and contains several intricate, silver-colored metal shapes. In the background, a product sheet reads "FEELS LIKE FROST SUITE" at the top, with various cards showing purple and blue tones, some featuring the text "Yuletide Cheer" and "you're in my heart!". The person, wearing a black long-sleeved garment, uses their left hand to hold the package while the right hand slides the metal dies out of the plastic sleeve. As the sequence progresses, the dies shift positions within the package, eventually moving toward the bottom edge as the plastic is peeled back to reveal the contents. Small printed details, including price and product codes, are visible on the white background of the product sheet.
